name: declarative-ai
description: Shared AI execution library: uniform contract for executing AI units (LLM calls, hierarchical workflows, agents) with validation, retry, rate limiting, metering, and a normalized event stream.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/services && tsc --noEmit -p packages/llm && tsc --noEmit -p packages/hw
